## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services to DeleteMe and explore potential partnership opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [DeleteMe is shifting focus to B2B, seeking to scale content creation with AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [GrowthX offers comprehensive AI-driven workflows for high-quality, scalable content production](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [GrowthX engagement starts with 8-week strategy sprint, followed by 12-month execution phase](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $15k/month, but is tailored based on specific needs identified in strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)

## Topics

### DeleteMe's Current Situation and Needs

  - [15-year-old company transitioning from B2C to B2B focus](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [B2B revenue now 50% of total, expected to outpace B2C growth](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Neil (Director of B2B Marketing) is a team of one, seeking to scale content creation](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [CEO pushing for AI tool adoption across the organization](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Primary needs: B2B content creation, SEO visibility, social media content](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Expertise required in cybersecurity/privacy and B2B use cases/buying committees](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)

### GrowthX's Offering and Approach

  - [AI-powered workflows combined with expert human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Focus on editorial content as starting point for engagements](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Comprehensive team including former TechCrunch editor-in-chief, SEO experts, and content managers](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Two-phase engagement: 8-week strategy sprint followed by 12-month execution](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
  - [Customizable workflows with inputs tailored to client's specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Fact-checking and quality assurance processes built into workflows](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)

### GrowthX's Team and Expertise

  - [Experienced leadership with backgrounds in growth marketing and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Specialized in B2B and technical content (e.g., cybersecurity clients like Abnormal Security)](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Team structure mimics publishing organizations for high-quality output](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)

### Engagement Structure and Deliverables

  - [Strategy sprint (8 weeks): Deep dive into personas, market insights, editorial roadmap, competitive analysis, SEO audit](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [12-month engagement: Execution of strategy with ongoing optimization](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
  - [Clients own the content and its impact, but not the underlying AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $15k/month, adjusted based on needs identified in strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send initial proposal and SOW for review](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
  - [Set up Slack channel for async communication and questions](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call to review SOW and GrowthX's insights on opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
  - [Neil to discuss internally with COO and potentially introduce GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [Explore deeper customer examples and use cases in future conversations](https://fathom.video/share/4mUCVtaK12-H-s6g3HUagviGTuUx5D6k?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
